description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows and a spacious attached garage on one side. The property is surrounded by several mature trees with dense, pink and white foliage, providing both privacy and natural beauty. The central courtyard area is visible from above, featuring green landscaping and open space. The house appears to have a single story, with a layout that emphasizes horizontal spread rather than vertical height. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional spaces and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an attached garage, surrounded by lush trees and a landscaped courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and attached garage, with trees framing the property.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by dense tree coverage, partially obscuring the house and highlighting the garage extension.
description_view_2: Rear view with extensive tree coverage, minimal house features visible except for the roofline and some windows.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the flat roof, central courtyard, and the arrangement of trees around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and minimal decorative elements
